prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次约12185→9540→9728→8230→12163，整体呈\"降-稳-降-升\"的波动形态；2024年因新高考首年（物理类）位次大幅前移至8230，2025 年回调至12163，近两年波动幅度约3933名，显示该校在甘肃物理类考生中的竞争热度存在较大年度波动；该校在甘肃物理类招生计划2021年49人、2022年46人 、2023年46人、2024年46人、2025年42人，呈小幅缩减趋势；2026年计划大幅增至60人，较2025年扩招约43%，扩招幅度显著，对竞争压力有明显缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 2025年高考周期内该校因师德师风事件（教师被指骚扰学生）被评价为偏负面，可能对部分考生报考意愿产生轻微抑制；抖音热度排名第90， 评价为\"一般\"，短视频平台曝光度不高；未见明显投档断档记录；药学为A+学科（全国顶尖），中药学学科实力突出；招生专业中药学类、中药学类、生物制 药、临床药学等均与药学A+学科直接关联，学科优势对相关专业报考有较强吸引力；211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年第88名，近年排名从2021年第91→2022年第97→2023年第96→2024年第102→2025年第86→2026年第88，整体稳中有升，属于 医药类头部院校。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 2026年专业热度数据显示，电气工程、电子信息、临床医学等为高热 专业，药学/医药类专业热度偏热但非顶流；甘肃省2026年普通高考总人数约218700人，按近年物理类占比约66%估算，物理类考生约14.4万人，较2025年物理类12.1 万人增长约19%，考生规模扩大加剧竞争。；该校位于江苏南 京，属东部发达地区，对甘肃考生有一定地域吸引力。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次12163、2026年大幅扩招43%的利好、甘肃物理类考生增长约19%的竞争加剧、声誉偏负面轻微抑制、药学A+学科持续吸引力等因素；考虑到2025年位次大幅后移可能含异常成分、扩招效应部分被考生增长抵消，适度回调后预测最低位次约15090名，区间14590–15590名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 12185 → 9540 → 9728 → 8230 → 12163, showing a fluctuating pattern of "down-stable-down-up"; in 2024, due to the first year of the new college entrance exam (Physics Category), the ranking significantly advanced to 8230, and in 2025 it fell back to 12163, with a fluctuation range of about 3933 places in the past two years, indicating significant annual volatility in competition among Gansu Physics Category candidates; the enrollment plan for this university in Gansu Physics Category was 49 in 2021, 46 in 2022, 46 in 2023, 46 in 2024, and 42 in 2025, showing a slight decreasing trend; the 2026 plan significantly increases to 60, an expansion of about 43% compared to 2025, which notably alleviates competitive pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: During the 2025 college entrance exam cycle, the university was rated somewhat negatively due to a teacher ethics incident (teacher accused of harassing students), which may slightly suppress some candidates' willingness to apply; Douyin popularity ranking is 90th, rated as "average", with low exposure on short video platforms; no obvious enrollment gaps were recorded; Pharmacy is an A+ discipline (top in the country), and Traditional Chinese Pharmacy has strong disciplinary strength; enrollment majors such as Traditional Chinese Pharmacy, Traditional Chinese Pharmacy, Biopharmaceuticals, and Clinical Pharmacy are directly related to the A+ Pharmacy discipline, with strong appeal for related majors; it is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university; in the 2026 Soft Science University Ranking, it ranks 88th, with recent rankings from 2021 (91st) → 2022 (97th) → 2023 (96th) → 2024 (102nd) → 2025 (86th) → 2026 (88th), showing overall stability with a slight upward trend, belonging to the top-tier medical universities.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: 2026 major popularity data shows that Electrical Engineering, Electronic Information, and Clinical Medicine are high-demand majors, while Pharmacy/Medical majors are moderately popular but not top-tier; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Gansu general college entrance exam is approximately 218,700, with Physics Category candidates estimated at about 144,000 based on the recent proportion of about 66%, an increase of about 19% compared to 2025's 121,000 Physics Category candidates, intensifying competition due to the expanded candidate pool; the university is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu, an eastern developed region, which has some regional appeal for Gansu candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 12163, the significant 43% enrollment expansion in 2026, the approximately 19% increase in Gansu Physics Category candidates intensifying competition, the slight suppression from negative reputation, and the sustained appeal of the A+ Pharmacy discipline; taking into account that the 2025 ranking's large backward shift may contain anomalies and that the expansion effect is partially offset by candidate growth, after moderate adjustment, the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 15090, with a range of 14590–15590.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Pharmacy (Top Innovation Class)
- Biopharmaceuticals (Top Innovation Class)
- Pharmacy (Pharmacy, Pharmaceutical Preparations, Pharmaceutical Analysis, Medicinal Chemistry).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Clinical Pharmacy
- Biopharmaceuticals
- Traditional Chinese Pharmacy (Traditional Chinese Pharmacy, Traditional Chinese Medicine Resources and Development, Traditional Chinese Pharmaceutical Engineering)
- Cosmetic Science and Technology
- Biomedical Data Science.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier)
- Pharmaceutical Administration
- Food Quality and Safety
- Marine Pharmacy.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The predicted ranking is around 15090, with a range of 14590–15590. Candidates with rankings within the lower bound (14590) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 Pharmacy Top Innovation Class and Pharmacy flagship majors; candidates in the middle of the range should prioritize Tier 2 majors while also attempting Tier 1; candidates near the upper bound (15590) are advised to use Tier 3 majors as safety options while also aiming for Tier 2 majors such as Traditional Chinese Pharmacy and Pharmaceutical Administration. The A+ Pharmacy discipline has outstanding strength, and all tier majors are related to the core Pharmacy discipline, making the overall application value high.

prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年第88名，近年排名稳中有升，属于医药类头部院校；2025年高考周期内该校因 师德师风事件被评价为偏负面，可能对报考意愿产生轻微抑制；抖音热度一般；未见投档断档记录；药学A+为全国顶尖学科，但历史类招生专业（经济管理试验 班、英语）与药学核心学科关联较弱，学科优势对历史类考生的吸引力相对有限。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 2026年专业热度中，经济管理类呈\"分化观望\"（金融/财经/经济类热 度分化），英语/外语类呈\"一般观望\"；甘肃省2026年普通高考总人数约218700人，按近年历史类占比约33%估算，历史类考生约7.2万人，较2025年历史类5.8万人增长约24%， 考生规模扩大加剧竞争。；该校位于江苏南京，属东部发达地 区，对甘肃考生有一定地域吸引力；历史类招生人数极少（6–8人），招生规模变化对整体录取位次影响较为敏感。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次1978、2026年扩招33%的 利好、历史类考生增长约24%的竞争加剧、声誉偏负面轻微抑制、历史类专业与药学核心学科关联较弱等因素；考虑到历史类位次历年波动 小、扩招与考生增长基本对冲，适度微调后预测最低位次约2344名，区间1922–2766名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 1585 → 2150 → 1933 → 1959 → 1978, with overall small fluctuation (about 565 places). In the recent three years, it stabilized in the 1930–1980 range, with a baseline ranking of about 1978 in 2025. The enrollment plan for this university in Gansu for History Category was 3 in 2021, 6 in 2022, 6 in 2023, 6 in 2024, and 6 in 2025. In 2026, the plan increases to 8, an expansion of about 33% compared to 2025, which is a significant increase and noticeably alleviates competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked 88th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with a stable or slightly rising ranking in recent years, belonging to the top-tier medical universities. During the 2025 college entrance examination cycle, the university was evaluated as somewhat negative due to a teacher ethics incident, which may slightly suppress application willingness. Douyin popularity is average; no record of enrollment gaps. Pharmacy is rated A+, the top national discipline, but the History Category majors (Economics and Management Experimental Class, English) are weakly related to the core pharmacy discipline, so the disciplinary advantage has limited appeal to History Category candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, major popularity shows that Economics and Management categories are in a 'differentiated wait-and-see' state (finance/economics/business majors have diverging popularity), while English/Foreign Language categories are in a 'general wait-and-see' state. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Gansu general college entrance examination is about 218,700. Estimating based on the recent History Category proportion of about 33%, there are about 72,000 History Category candidates, an increase of about 24% from 58,000 in 2025, intensifying competition due to the larger candidate pool. The university is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu, an eastern developed region, which has some regional appeal to Gansu candidates. The History Category enrollment is extremely small (6–8 people), making the overall admission ranking sensitive to changes in enrollment scale.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 1978, the 33% enrollment expansion in 2026 as a positive factor, the 24% increase in History Category candidates intensifying competition, the slightly negative reputation causing mild suppression, and the weak correlation between History Category majors and the core pharmacy discipline; given the small historical fluctuation in History Category rankings and the basic offset between enrollment expansion and candidate growth, after moderate adjustment, the predicted minimum ranking is about 2344, with a range of 1922–2766.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Economics and Management Experimental Class (Business Administration, Health Service and Management, Medical Product Management) (Pharmaceutical Direction).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- None (History Category has only 2 enrollment majors, with little difference in difficulty).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- English (Pharmaceutical Direction).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The predicted ranking is around 2344, with a range of 1922–2766. History Category has only 2 enrollment majors. Candidates with rankings below the lower limit of the range (1922) can prioritize the Economics and Management Experimental Class; candidates in the middle to later part of the range can consider both majors, with English (Pharmaceutical Direction) having slightly lower admission difficulty. It is recommended to choose based on personal interests and career plans.
